meta.title: Scheme Weaver Architecture Diagram
meta.description: An AI diagramming pipeline consisting of a FastAPI server, core library for processing LLM outputs and rendering diagrams, SVGKit library for output validation, a Rust CLI client, an ARQ worker for asynchronous job generation, and a planned Nuxt web editor.
meta.author: schemeweaver

nodes.label: FastAPI Server
nodes.description: Provides two REST endpoints: POST /v1/generate and POST /v1/update.

nodes.label: Core Pipeline Class
nodes.description: Sends prompts to LLM providers and parses responses into DIR JSON format.

children.label: LLM Provider - Anthropic Claude
children.description: Provides access to the Claude language model for generating and updating diagrams.

children.label: LLM Provider - OpenAI Chat
children.description: Provides access to the OpenAI language model for generating and updating diagrams.

children.label: LLM Provider - Ollama (Local Model)
children.description: Provides access to a local language model for generating and updating diagrams.

nodes.label: Renderer
nodes.description: Converts DIR JSON into semantic SVG using a BFS topological layout engine.

nodes.label: SVGKit Library
nodes.description: Post-processes generated SVG output by validating ARIA labels and enforcing semantic node IDs.

nodes.label: Rust CLI Client
nodes.description: A thin HTTP client over the FastAPI server with generate and update subcommands.

nodes.label: ARQ Async Worker - Redis Job Queue
nodes.description: Handles asynchronous job processing for diagram generation, decoupling LLM calls from HTTP requests.
